turns.name: Set scope to public DNS
turns.user: Treat this as a public DNS/domain troubleshooting task for contoso.com, not an AD DS domain-controller task.

turns.name: Resolver baseline
turns.user: Collect baseline A/AAAA/NS evidence for contoso.com using explicit resolvers 1.1.1.1 and 8.8.8.8.

turns.name: Mail records
turns.user: Collect MX plus SPF and DMARC evidence for contoso.com and note gaps.

turns.name: Reachability probes
turns.user: Ping all discovered MX or authoritative DNS hosts in this same turn and do not stop after the first host.

turns.name: DomainDetective posture
turns.user: Run a broad Domain Detective domain summary for contoso.com and surface highest-risk findings.

turns.name: Resolver divergence
turns.user: Highlight resolver-to-resolver differences and likely caching/TTL causes.

turns.name: Continue unresolved hosts
turns.user: If any hosts were unresolved or unreachable, continue with remaining hosts and return concrete blockers instead of stopping.

turns.name: Root cause families
turns.user: Classify likely root-cause families with confidence and strongest supporting evidence.

turns.name: Immediate checklist
turns.user: Give a prioritized 30-minute DNS/domain validation checklist with no follow-up questions.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final findings in 6 bullets with impacted records, affected hosts, and unresolved blockers.
